hero.headline: At-Home Massage in Ho Chi Minh City — Safe, Discreet & Professional
hero.subheadline: Body Massage, Japanese Shiatsu, Swedish Massage... Therapist comes to you, on time. Book now with just a Zalo message.
hero.imageAlt: At-home massage service in Ho Chi Minh City

premiumIntro.headline:
Spa-standard care
at your place.
premiumIntro.description: Experience premium at-home massage in Ho Chi Minh City. Our certified therapists bring the same quality and care you expect from a top spa — with total discretion and convenience.

services.title: Pricing
services.noteLateBooking: Rates after 11:30 PM apply to late-night bookings.

body.name: Body Massage
body.description: Relieve pain and boost blood circulation throughout the body
body.details: Deep full-body massage techniques to release muscle tension, reduce pain and improve circulation. Certified therapists come to your location with all equipment and premium natural oils.

neck.name: Shoulder & Neck Massage
neck.description: Relieve muscle tension in neck and shoulders from prolonged desk work
neck.details: Deep massage focused on the neck, shoulder and upper back area to release muscle knots from long hours at a computer. Helps improve posture, reduce headaches and restore flexibility.

shiatsu.name: Japanese Shiatsu
shiatsu.description: Acupressure to unblock energy flow and restore the body
shiatsu.details: Traditional Japanese Shiatsu acupressure targets specific pressure points on the body to unblock energy flow, reduce chronic fatigue and strengthen the body's natural immunity.

swedish.name: Swedish Massage
swedish.description: Improve sleep quality, balance the mind and achieve total relaxation
swedish.details: Swedish massage uses gentle, rhythmic strokes to deeply relax the nervous system, improve sleep quality and bring a wonderful sense of mental balance and well-being.

benefits.headline: Spa-standard at-home massage — fast, safe, transparent.
benefits.subheadline: Whether at home, apartment or hotel in Ho Chi Minh City, Iku Massage delivers the right treatment — on time — at the right price.

reasons.title: Vetted & verified therapists
reasons.description: Trained technicians, professional conduct, respectful of customers.

reasons.title: Book in 30 seconds
reasons.description: Choose service — choose time — send address. Confirmed via Zalo/Hotline/Booking.

reasons.title: Quick arrival across Ho Chi Minh City
reasons.description: Optimized by area so the therapist arrives on time (by district and time slot).

reasons.title: Transparent pricing, no hidden fees
reasons.description: Clear pricing by duration and time slot. No hidden charges, no upselling.

reasons.title: Clean, hygienic equipment
reasons.description: Oils, towels and tools prepared neatly and kept clean for at-home service.

reasons.title: Support before & after your session
reasons.description: Reschedule, choose a treatment, or give feedback — support team responds quickly.

benefits.commitment: Civil commitment: Iku Massage provides only professional therapeutic and relaxation services. We decline any inappropriate requests.

step1.title: Check Pricing & Choose Package
step1.description: Select the duration and service package that fits your needs

step2.title: Book via Zalo
step2.description: Send your address, package choice and preferred time via Zalo — confirmed within minutes

step3.title: Therapist Arrives On Time — Relax at Home
step3.description: Your therapist arrives on schedule with full equipment. Just lie down and enjoy

items.name: Ms. N.

q1.question: Which areas in Ho Chi Minh City do you serve?
q1.answer: We serve all districts in Ho Chi Minh City and surrounding areas. Please message us on Zalo to confirm your specific address.

q2.question: What are your service hours?
q2.answer: We serve from 8:00 AM - 11:30 PM daily, including weekends and holidays.

q3.question: Can I reschedule or cancel?
q3.answer: Yes, you can reschedule or cancel by contacting us via Zalo or hotline at least 2 hours in advance.

q4.question: What do I need to prepare at home?
q4.answer: Just be home and have a comfortable space to lie down. Our therapist will bring all tools, oils and towels needed.

q5.question: What is your privacy policy?
q5.answer: We are fully committed to protecting customer information and will never share it with third parties.

featuredServices.title: Featured Services
featuredServices.subtitle: Choose a treatment that fits your goals: relaxation — pain relief — energy recovery.

massage-thai.name: Thai Massage
massage-thai.description: Stretching, acupressure and release of full-body tension.
bullets: Relief for neck, shoulder, back and hip tension
Ideal for desk workers and low activity

detail.overview: Thai massage combines stretching, acupressure and therapeutic release of muscle tension. Ideal when you feel stiff from sitting too long, low activity or that "locked up" feeling after a long day.
benefits: Relief from stiff neck, shoulders, back and hips
Better muscle and joint flexibility and posture
Feeling lighter and more alert after the session
suitableFor: Office workers who sit a lot and move little
People with back or joint pain who need deep release
Those who like strong pressure (can be adjusted)
detail.procedure: Light warm-up → acupressure by area → stretching arms/legs/back → cool-down and aftercare tips.
detail.notes: Not recommended during acute injury, severe sprain, or unexplained pain. Consult first if unsure.
detail.ctaText: Want proper deep muscle release? Choose Thai Massage and note any sore areas so the therapist can adjust pressure.

massage-aroma.name: Aromatherapy Massage
massage-aroma.description: Deep relaxation with essential oils, gently bringing the body to a calm state.

detail.overview: Aromatherapy massage is a deep relaxation treatment with essential oils, using light to medium pressure to bring the body into a calm state, improve sleep and reduce stress.
benefits: Relax the nervous system and ease tension
Better sleep and less mental fatigue
Gentle softening of muscles for comfort
suitableFor: People under stress, poor sleep, headaches, heavy workload
Those who prefer gentle massage without strong pressure
Anyone needing to "recharge" after a long day
detail.procedure: Choose your scent → relaxing strokes with breath rhythm → focus on neck, shoulders, back → finish with light pressure points and hydration tips.
detail.notes: If you have scent allergies or sensitive skin, tell us in advance so we can switch oils or use a neutral carrier.
detail.ctaText: Need to relax and sleep better tonight? Choose Aromatherapy and pick a scent you like (light, warm or soothing).

massage-da-nong.name: Hot Stone Massage
massage-da-nong.description: Warm stones relax muscles quickly and ease stiffness and cold tension.
bullets: Ideal for long-term back and shoulder fatigue

detail.overview: Hot stone massage uses warmth from stones to soften muscles quickly, support circulation and ease deep tension. The warmth is very satisfying for people who often feel cold or have long-standing back fatigue.
benefits: Warm muscles, reduce stiffness and soreness
suitableFor: People with long-standing shoulder, neck or back pain
Those with cold hands and feet or prone to tight muscles
Anyone wanting deep relaxation with comfortable pressure
detail.procedure: Warm the area → place stones on tension points → combine with kneading → finish with relaxation and rest tips.
detail.notes: Avoid when you have fever, skin inflammation in the treatment area, or are very heat-sensitive. The therapist will adjust temperature to your comfort.
detail.ctaText: Want quick release, warmth and a lighter back? Choose Hot Stone for an optimal session.

massage-thuy-dien.name: Swedish Massage
massage-thuy-dien.description: Classic spa-style strokes — gliding, kneading and working the muscles for balance between relaxation and recovery.

detail.overview: Swedish massage is the classic spa style: long strokes, kneading and working muscle groups for a balance of relaxation and recovery. Very suitable for first-time massage.
benefits: Relief from full-body muscle fatigue and comfortable release
Mild improvement in circulation and less sluggishness
Support muscle recovery after work or travel
suitableFor: First-time massage clients who want a "just right" feel
People with overall fatigue who don’t need strong pressure
Anyone wanting relaxation plus light recovery
detail.procedure: Warm-up and muscle prep → long strokes along muscles → work shoulders, neck and back → relaxing finish.
detail.notes: If you have specific sore areas (neck, shoulders, back, thighs), note them so the therapist can focus more there.
detail.ctaText: Want a "classic spa, comfortable, suits everyone" session? Choose Swedish Massage.

footer.tagline: At-home massage in Ho Chi Minh City — safe, discreet and professional. Therapist comes to you on time.
